name: Social Media Hook
description: Vertical video format optimized for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts

hook.content: Pattern interrupt - stop the scroll with something unexpected

value.content: Deliver the value quickly and clearly

cta.content: Follow, comment, or click - make it actionable

tips: Start with a strong visual or statement
Use captions - most viewers watch without sound
Keep pacing fast - attention spans are short
End with a question to drive comments
exampleScript: Stop doing [common mistake]! Here's what actually works. [Share insight/tip]. This changed everything for me. Follow for more tips like this!
